data.title: Celestia (TIA) falls to $1.02, near 52-week low of $0.93. Technical indicators point to further decline amid market weakness.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Celestia (TIA) has seen a decline in its value to $1.02, nearing its lowest point in the last 52 weeks at $0.93. Technical indicators suggest that there is ongoing downward pressure on its price due to the absence of significant catalysts.

data.title: Galleri blood test increased cancer detection by 7x when added to recommended screenings, detecting over half early stage.
data.description: Over half of the cancers identified by Galleri were in their early stages, indicating the effectiveness of early detection. Around 75% of the cancers detected by Galleri did not have screenings that were previously recommended. PATHFINDER 2, the most extensive U.S. Multi-Cancer Early Detection study in the cancer screening population, has yielded these results.

data.title: Aave price hits $209 support, drops 8.6% post-21% rally on Treasury upgrade news; now $209.45.
data.description: The price of Aave has dropped to $209.45, marking an 8.6% decrease as traders opt to cash in their gains after the announcement of the DAO's treasury-backed economic overhaul, which had previously caused a significant 21% jump earlier in the week.

data.title: STEP Energy Services Ltd. will go private at $5.50/share with ARC Financial Corp's funds; deal with 2659160 Alberta Ltd. announced.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, STEP Energy Services Ltd. ("STEP" or the "Company") has signed a definitive arrangement agreement (the "Arrangement Agreement") with 2659160 Alberta Ltd. and the limited partnerships of ARC Energy Fund 8. This agreement follows the non-binding offer received from ARC Financial Corp. on September 25, 2025. This deal involves a private equity fund advised by ARC Financial Corp., and the Company's TSX symbol is STEP.

data.title: Stock market indexes up for the week on Trump news. Dow Jones rose with American Express leading. Oracle stock dives.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index saw a notable increase, with American Express emerging as a significant gainer. The overall stock market performance this week has been impressive, with indexes experiencing growth amidst notable news related to Trump. However, Oracle faced a decline. This live coverage highlights the upward trend in the market, showcasing a strong performance. The Dow Jones index's rise, coupled with American Express's success, indicates a positive trajectory in today's trading session. This information is brought to you by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: HBAR price nears crucial $0.16 mark, drops 3.4% daily amid rising geopolitical tensions, leading to 11% weekly decline.
data.description: The current price of Hedera's cryptocurrency, HBAR, is critically positioned at $0.16, experiencing a daily decrease of 3.4%. This decline is influenced by escalating geopolitical tensions and regulatory uncertainties causing continuous selling pressure in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: PEPE down 40% in a month, now $0.00 with a 1.9% daily drop. Market selloff linked to Bitcoin's slide under $65,000.
data.description: The cryptocurrency PEPE is currently trading at $0.00, experiencing a 1.9% daily decrease. This decline is part of a larger 40% drop over the past month, driven by Bitcoin's fall below $65,000 and reduced investor trust in alternative digital currencies.

data.description: In the upcoming weeks, the creator of a prominent Chinese crypto platform is set to unveil a trust, supported by advocates of Ether.
